title: The Mana Influx Omnibus: Books 1–3
subtitle: The opening trilogy collected
blurb: Grab the first three Mana Influx novels in a single edition. Follow Bronwic’s rise from reluctant retiree to linchpin of humanity’s resistance as mana reshapes everything. Includes Tall Tales of Bronwic, Dark Mana Outbreak, and Shattered Siege with author’s notes and refreshed edits.
